domain: Aztec calendar dual-cycle system: Xiuhpōhualli (365-day solar/agricultural, 18×20 + 5 nēmontēmi extra days) + Tōnalpōhualli (260-day ritual, 13 numbers × 20 day-signs); together form 52-year Calendar Round (xiuhmolpilli/bundle); engaged rotating gears; xiuhmolpilli New Fire Ceremony every 52 years (12-day fast + extinguish all fires + rekindle = cosmic renewal); pre-Columbian Mesoamerica
specific_mechanism: XIUHMOLPILLI-DUAL-CYCLE-365-260-ENGAGED-GEARS-NEW-FIRE-MEMORY: dual-cycle memory architecture with (1) dual-cycle memory stores M_solar + M_ritual: long-term M_solar holds factual/agricultural information indexed by 365-position cycle; M_ritual holds ritual/identity information indexed by 260-position cycle; (2) engaged-gears alignment: cross-store query returns content where both cycles align; lcm(365, 260) = 18,980 = 52-year fixed-period checkpoint; (3) xiuhmolpilli 52-cycle fire-renewal ceremony: every 52 cycles, fire-purge operation runs — all stale memory cells (last-accessed > threshold) extinguished + reinitialized; symbolic 'new fire' rebirth; (4) nēmontēmi 5-day garbage-collection slot: 5 unnamed slots per cycle reserved for deferred GC of low-importance writes; (5) 20-day-signs × 13-numbers cross-indexed retrieval: ritual store indexed by (sign, number) tuple — 260 unique positions; cross-store lookup combines solar position + ritual tuple. Differs from R529 CUNEIFORM-2-AXIS-WEDGE-DEPTH-ORIENTATION-MEMORY (2-axis K-depth × M-orientation 16-cell encoding + per-tablet page granular + reed K-cohort scribe + baking-confirm permanence freeze + fibrous-impression metadata, no dual-cycle 365+260 + no engaged-gears + no xiuhmolpilli fire-renewal + no nēmontēmi GC + no 20×13 cross-indexed) by dual-cycle stores M_solar+M_ritual + engaged-gears 52-year alignment + xiuhmolpilli fire-renewal periodic purge + nēmontēmi 5-day GC slot + 20×13 cross-indexed retrieval.
llm_application: XIUHMOLPILLI-DUAL-CYCLE-365-260-ENGAGED-GEARS-NEW-FIRE-MEMORY dual-cycle memory architecture + M_solar 365-position long-term M_ritual 260-position ritual indexed stores + engaged-gears cross-store alignment lcm 18980 52-year fixed checkpoint + xiuhmolpilli 52-cycle fire-renewal ceremony stale-cell extinguish-reinit + nēmontēmi 5-day GC slot deferred low-importance + 20-day-signs × 13-numbers cross-indexed retrieval. Differs from R408. R428. R442. R454. R470. R479. R492. R504 GGANTIJA. R529 CUNEIFORM-2-AXIS (closest — 2-axis depth-orientation + K-cohort + baking + fibrous metadata). Differs from MemGPT + LLM Memory Survey 2603.07670 + Persistent Frozen 2603.16413 + KV Freeze 2512.11221 by dual-cycle + engaged-gears + fire-renewal + nēmontēmi + cross-indexed. Differs by DUAL-CYCLE 365+260 ENGAGED-GEARS + XIUHMOLPILLI 52-YEAR FIRE-RENEWAL + NĒMONTĒMI 5-DAY GC SLOT + 20×13 CROSS-INDEXED RETRIEVAL.
novelty_claim: LLM Memory Architectures + Memory LLM Agents Survey 2603.07670 + Persistent Memory Frozen LLM 2603.16413 + Soft Rolling KV Freeze 2512.11221 cover hierarchical memory + persistent + freeze paradigm. XIUHMOLPILLI-DUAL-CYCLE-365-260-ENGAGED-GEARS-NEW-FIRE-MEMORY adds (a) dual-cycle M_solar+M_ritual + (b) engaged-gears 52-year alignment + (c) xiuhmolpilli fire-renewal purge + (d) nēmontēmi 5-day GC + (e) 20×13 cross-indexed retrieval. Recombination — borderline lookup.
